name: Hunters ▷ Kaveh and Alhaitham
description:
▷ Being pursued by two of the best hunters in the region wasn't fun at all. You yourself have lived quite a peaceful life as a mythical being that many greedy individuals would love to get their hands on, and Kaveh and Alhaitham weren't any different; wanting you for themselves.

[Art does not belong to me. Credits to @hailailai2 on twitter!! And always please give necessary feedback or what you think about these characters!]
creator: Wun
